hotel_name: Renaissance Saint Elm Dallas Downtown Hotel

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: The hotel manager was terrible and wouldn’t help me to change my reservations after I expressed to her I have a family member who needed surgery. She was rude. I will never stay here.

reviews.title: ‼️OUR VEHICLE WAS STOLEN FROM THE PROPERTY ‼️
reviews.positives: I didn’t like anything about the property. Upon arrival, I felt a bit uneasy but I didn’t know why.
reviews.negatives: Our truck was stolen from the parking lot, and unfortunately, the staff was unhelpful in assisting us with notifying the authorities. Their lack of reaction to the incident was concerning, as they refused to review the camera footage. We were informed that only the manager could access the footage to provide it to the police, and that would not occur until Monday. This theft happened on Good Friday, and we had not even been at the hotel for a full day. I cannot recommend this hotel to anyone, as it is evident that vehicles are not secure on their premises.

reviews.title: Not upscale service
reviews.text:
Good bed. Nice view. Great shower. Delicious food. Well stocked bar. Great bar/rstrnt service. Good pianist/singer. 

Bar/restrnt closes at 10pm most nights. Valet is atrocious —Lingering/persistent in luggage service and tip expectation, then 35 min wait for car pickup.  Then had me drive my own car from valet lot to save time. One register open at check out was another wait. Wife suffering from migraine but staff would not allow a couple hours of late check out to give her meds a chance to work.  They did offer to charge a full extra day though. When I asked for room service to provide extra tea packets, the person in charge said they dont provide tea . When I told her the housekeeping staff already had given us more the day before, she launched an investigation into who dare provide us with complementary packets of their world class tea.  I finally helped her understand it was just their normal packets and no one violated the tea embargo. She laughed.  

We wont be back.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives:
The hotel was comfortable and in a good location. 
The tram stop is close to the hotel which gets us to the airport.
reviews.negatives:
Even though the room was pre-booked, I was still charged for the night and am still waiting on a response from the hotel and booking.com on a refund.
I would have expected better systems in place to manage this so guests aren't charged twice.
I booked my stay 19 Sep, called Renaissance 9 Oct and have still not received a reply on the 24th Oct.

We didn't find the concierge knowledgeable of the area which was disappointing

reviews.title: Great service!
reviews.text: I have a wonderful experience at this hotel. I had to make a last minute addition to my reservation as I was flying in around midnight and my roommate was getting in much earlier. I used the online text and everything was handled very quickly and efficiently! Also, the fruit-infused water in the lobby each day was great!

reviews.title: Would never stay again for the same price.
reviews.positives: The renovation is nice, very cool/funky art everywhere. Great location in Deep Ellum, very close to the venue of the wedding we were in town to attend.
reviews.negatives:
When we arrived check-in took about 45 mins because the internet was out. We couldn’t get an actual room key because of the internet outage, a staff member had to take us to our room and let us in. The tv in our room did not work, again due to the internet that was not repaired our whole stay. Housekeeping started cleaning rooms on our floor about 8:30am and we were woken by the doors to other rooms slamming shut. Also there’s a QR code in the room that claims there’s in-room dining/room service from the restaurant downstairs, but that’s not true - scanning the code just brings up a menu.

Overall we were super disappointed by this stay, the experience did not match the price tag whatsoever. We could have stayed at the Holiday Inn for half the price and all the amenities would have been functional or they would have tried to make up for it. This stay was a real damper on a wedding/birthday weekend.

reviews.title: Beautiful hotel
reviews.text: We attended a concert at The Majestic and this hotel was right next door so it made the perfect choice to stay overnight.

reviews.title: I booked and prepaid my room with booking.com and when I arrived the front desk charged my credit card for the stay twic
reviews.negatives: The AC in the rooms does not work well it was very hot.

reviews.title: Birthday Overnighter
reviews.text: Husband and I went for his birthday just to get away. We live only 20 miles East. Great staff, great room, great lobby and more!

reviews.title: Uncomfortable. Rude staff.
reviews.negatives: Staff was rude. There was no parking garage and staff was not helpful at all as to telling us where we should park etc other than suggesting valet and then shrugging their shoulders when we asked is there somewhere close to park. The temperature in the room was too warm despite turning the AC on. During our stay half the lights in the room went out and we couldn’t get them back on. The shower was freezing cold the entire time. Water never heated up. There was no microwave in the room..the restaurant at the hotel was slow service and they completely left out my entire order and claimed I never ordered, but everyone at my table got their food except me, and I did order with the waiter. Overall would not recommend and definitely will not stay there again.

reviews.title: Gorgeous hotel in great downtown location
reviews.text: The facilities and room were lovely. Staff we great and check in was very quick and easy. The hotel is in a great location for exploring downtown.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: When I checked in a black lady in the front was extremely rude. It's so expensive for no reason no parking so you have to pay 50$ a day for Valet

reviews.title: Convenient and beautiful
reviews.text: The suite was excellent. Bed was comfortable, the pillows were soft, the bathroom was nice. Right in downtown  Dallas. Area is relatively safe, lots of homeless people around. Close to shops and some major tourist sites.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: I liked the location to everything downtown.
reviews.negatives: The staff did not have the room ready with trash bags or any towels for us. It took them all day and usk asking 3 times to get us towels and me asking again at the end of the night when we returned from dinner.

reviews.title: Ottimo hotel ma non è quello in foto
reviews.text:
Hotel in pieno downtown di Dallas, con valet parking. All'interno ottima gym, le stanze sono ampie e il personale molto accogliente. 
Evitate Dallas downtown nel WE o dopo le 18 non c'è un cane in giro. Dovete spostarvi a Depp Ellum (10 minuti a piedi) o Fort Worth (40 minuti in auto).

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: Excellent location in downtown. Great vintage atmosphere!
reviews.negatives: "The air conditioning in our room was incredibly loud, making it difficult to get a good night's sleep."

reviews.title: 美好的住宿體驗
reviews.text: 地點交通便利、房間乾淨舒適

reviews.title: Fair
reviews.positives: It’s a nice place, good vibe.
reviews.negatives: Not enough staff at time of check in,  it was so busy, there were only 2 staff at check in and one of them seemed to be in training which I think was the reason I ended up being over charged and with additional charges on a second credit card, then when I called and left a voicemail about this issue  for Kyle B., the accountant, he never returned my call.

reviews.title: 회사동료와 투베드 이용후기
reviews.text: 출장차 갔던 호텔입니다. 서비스가 미쿡 특유의 느긋함이 있었긴 하지만 만족스러웠고, 인종차별은 1도 없었습니다. 다른 방에 투베드룸에 3명이서 잤는데 추가 이불을 요청하자 바로 가져다 주어서 다 잘 잤다고 합니다. 방도 넓고 훌륭했습니다. 밤에 펍을 로비서 하는데 술한잔하기 딱 좋은 분위기 입니다.

reviews.title: For such rate not really worth it.
reviews.positives: Great rooms, fresh interior, clean, great location
reviews.negatives: No food options for work travelers. I arrived Friday evening and Saturday Morning 7 am I’ve already had a set up. chocolate bars and 2 days sandwiches on white bun, that is not what traveler needs. I didn’t had time for restaurant, which is closed until 10 am on Weekends. Such hotel supposed to serve Breakfast- eggs, veggies, fruits. It was very frustrating.

reviews.title: Decent hotel; wonderful staff
reviews.positives: It was close to the venue where the show was that I came to Dallas for. The staff was super friendly & helpful.
reviews.negatives: It was just a regular hotel with regular amenities close to downtown. Nothing about the room itself made it worth the exorbitant price. The location & the staff made it worth the price. I hope they get paid exorbitant wages.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.negatives: Staff at the reception desk wasn’t diligent. It was the worst experience I have had at a hotel check in. It took us about an hour.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: I liked the way the hotel was styled- it was a mix of modern and art deco. I liked the record players in every room- so unique. The room itself was nice, although dark and not a lot of natural sunlight. I also prefer when there is a proper bathroom door instead of a sliding door.
reviews.negatives: It was a bit pricey and breakfast was not included.
